name: Fuse.Main

documentation.description:
First instantiate this package. Then start implementing the functions
for the generic nested packages. Instantiate those in order to register
your functions. Call the Main function to mount the filesystem

subprograms.name: Main

generic_instantiations.name: General
generic_instantiations.code:
package General is
   new Fuse.General
         (System,
          Log_Level,
          Log_File_Name);

generic_instantiations.name: Operations
generic_instantiations.code:
package Operations is
   new Fuse.Operations
         (System  => System,
          General => General,
          Buffer_Access => Buffer_Access,
          User_Data_Access => User_Data_Access);

generic_instantiations.name: System
generic_instantiations.code:
package System is
   new Fuse.System
         (User_Data_Type,
          IO.File_Type,
          File_Access);

formals.name: Element_Array
formals.code: type Element_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Element_Type;

packages.code:
generic
    with function Destroy
      (Userdata : access User_Data_Type)
      return System.Error_Type is <>;
package Destroy
